reviews.review_text: we stayed for the first time here. we booked a little two bedroom for our family of 5 and it was perfect. we had a blast here! our daughter loved going to see the birds every morning and the kids loved swimming in the pools. the pools were very cold (end of April) so I was gutted I didn't get to have a swim. the staff were very helpful. I asked for clean towels everyday due to going to the theme parks and they gave them to me. the little store they have here is cool! the kids liked spending some of their money here. we didn't get to see much of the grounds as we were busy at the parks and the day we had a chill day it was raining but from what we could see the grounds are nicely kept. it was handy to have a self serviced laundry. the machines cost $6 each. I had issues with one of the driers and the friendly staff helped me. we will definitely be staying again!

As a guest it was clear that a lot has been invested into the ongoing maintenance of the park and the facilities. Our accomodation (and the park as a whole) was clean and well presented. Staff were very approachable and keen to help. My kids enjoyed the free school holiday activities which were also well run. The location is good for a family Gold Coast vacation as it is only 15 minutes to surfers paradise and each of the theme parks. The pools were well presented and my kids swam at the start and end of each day. We would definitely consider visiting again for our next Queensland family holiday
Great family run park. Love the birds and pool area.

We just spent a week across 4x self contained cabins with my family and it exceeded expectations. The rooms have everything you could need and are spacious. I was impressed with the amount of storage so that you can settle in. This was appreciated after living out of a bag for a few days prior!

The pool area is so well maintained and it is clear that the staff care a lot about service. It is suitable for younger kids, but also has a large area for relaxing and deeper pools for swimming.

The range and quality of the activities for kids was communicated clearly, run effectively and reflected the care taken to go above and beyond in other areas.

We had such a great time!

Would stay here again.
Clean.
Loved seeing the birds!

We have just left Ashmore Palms after a week long stay as a large family group over Easter and the first week of school holidays. We found the park and staff to be excellent. The accommodation (3 bedroom cabins) were spotlessly clean with everything we could need for our stay. The staff were helpful and accommodating to our needs as a large group. The park grounds were super well maintained and cleaned thoroughly everyday. The birds in the pool area were a real bonus and we enjoyed visiting the on multiple occasions. The additional activities for the kids were varied and fun and the visiting food trucks on Friday night were excellent for some on site catering. The location of the park is excellent, it is 15/20min to everywhere on the coast including Surfers Paradise, Pacific Fair, HOTA and the theme parks. The location is lovely and quiet. Overall we highly recommend Ashmore Palms for a family holiday (large or small).

Lovely place for a quick visit to the Gold Coast. We rented a Macaw Mansion for 4 nights and we were a quick drive to the amusement parks without breaking the budget. The 2 bedroom, 2 bath with a small kitchen and full fridge were perfect for our family of 4. It was quite luxurious for a home away from home. The linens were standard hotel linens, towels plentiful, soft and clean. No pool towels though. There was loads of events for the kids and especially fun was the egg hunt. The staff hid loads of chocolate eggs for our kids, and it was the highest attended event all week, and the facepainting was fantastic. It was so nice to be able to enjoy a hunt instead of having to make the magic myself. The pool was excellent, hardly anyone there, maybe 1 or 2 other families every time we were there and plenty of chairs. The water all feature was very relaxing. We didn't try the X games or any of the included activities for the kids other than the egg hunt. We were out enjoying the GC!

Our only complaint is how loud the macaws and cockatoos are. They're so beautiful to look at and watch the caretakers wash out their cages and talk to us about their funny personalities but they're very loud first thing in the morning! I had to look up their decibel rating, they're of the loudest birds in the world. The staff can't do anything about how loud the birds are but they call more frequently and much louder than roosters. I wouldn't stay here again purely because the macaws woke us up everyday at 6am and were loud until the sun went down. They sure are special and beautiful, but unfortunately too close to the Macaw Mansions, the nicest accommodation type available.

A good place to stay.
Been on holiday recently, and Ashmore is a cosy area for tourists.

We stayed here for 7 nights and can highly recommend the park the park is very well maintained and has plenty of activities for kids its central location makes it even better its only a 20 min drive to surfers and movie world, the birds are awesome and will say hello when you see them which my kids thought was amazing we will definitely be bsck.

I'd highly recommend staying at Ashmore Holiday Village. The staff are lovely, the kids loved the pool and playgrounds, it's close to a supermarket  too. Perfect for families! Thank you so much for a great stay!
Visited here with a friend and enjoyed a nice weekend. Can very much recommend as somewhere to stay by yourself or with the whole family.
Great family holiday park excellent customer service friendly staff

We recently stayed in Paradise Penthouse #48, and it exceeded every expectation. The apartment was absolutely immaculate and thoughtfully equipped with everything we needed — and more. It was incredibly spacious, and each of our children having their own double bed made it even more comfortable for our family.
The modern styling was beautiful, and we especially loved the fun touch of having our own slushie machine in the apartment! The two pools were perfect for relaxing and entertaining the kids, and the on-site convenience store was so handy for those last-minute essentials.
Having our own private mini putting green out the back was such a unique bonus, and the carport connected directly to the apartment made everything so easy and convenient.
The service from staff was excellent- we arrived after 7pm when reception was closed and the after hours arrival process was super easy & straight forward.
Without a doubt, this is one of the nicest places we’ve ever stayed. We can’t wait to come back!
Definitely stay again.
Beautiful clean lodge, fantastic customer service in perfect location for all beaches and theme parks.
Great place reasonable priced clean tidy unit all you need at camp shop

Ashmore Palms was the perfect place for mine and my kids first ever Gold Coast getaway. It was centrally located to all the activities we wanted to do (15-20 mins to Surfers one way depending on traffic and 15-20 mins to theme parks) nice and close and very easy to get on to the M1 to head to Brissy, Sunny Coast or down to Burleigh for the day! The park itself catered well for myself and my the kids. The twins pools and the exotic birds being our favourite activities.
Definitely worth the price we paid, was actually around $500-$1000 cheaper than a place right on the beach. 3 bedroom villa was quite big enough for our family of 5. Only downside was beds were a little uncomfortable.

We had such an amazing time at Ashmore Palms Holiday Village.|The cabin was just what we needed for a family of 3 and we could see there were lots of different options for larger families, couples & big groups.|We felt super safe, and the place was immaculate - staff were always happy to lend a hand, they really spoilt us and made us feel so welcome.|Great activities onsite such as Xplay, kids activities, outdoor sports courts, and many parrot aviaries which our daughter loved.|The swimming lagoons were a great, and the BBQ areas were perfect for family dinners.|Location-wise, it's hard to beat - close to theme parks, Surfers Paradise beach, and all the action on Cavill Ave. Plus, unlike some of the other places we've stayed at that felt super crowded, Ashmore Palms had plenty of space to breathe. And a huge plus - we could park our car right outside our cabin, no hassle like with apartments.|Check-in was a breeze too -the after-hours key collection instructions were really clear and easy to follow. Nearby, you've got heaps of options - food outlets, petrol stations, supermarkets like ALDI, and even a Starbucks for our morning coffee fix.|Bonus was they had their own village store too.|Thanks guys, we will definitely return - would totally recommend Ashmore Palms to anyone looking for a relaxed, fun-filled Gold Coast getaway.

We had such an amazing time at Ashmore Palms Holiday Village.
The cabin was just what we needed for a family of 3 and we could see there were lots of different options for larger families, couples & big groups.
We felt super safe, and the place was immaculate - staff were always happy to lend a hand, they really spoilt us and made us feel so welcome.
Great activities onsite such as Xplay, kids activities, outdoor sports courts, and many parrot aviaries which our daughter loved.
The swimming lagoons were a great, and the BBQ areas were perfect for family dinners.
Location-wise, it's hard to beat - close to theme parks, Surfers Paradise beach, and all the action on Cavill Ave. Plus, unlike some of the other places we've stayed at that felt super crowded, Ashmore Palms had plenty of space to breathe. And a huge plus - we could park our car right outside our cabin, no hassle like with apartments.
Check-in was a breeze too -the after-hours key collection instructions were really clear and easy to follow. Nearby, you've got heaps of options - food outlets, petrol stations, supermarkets like ALDI, and even a Starbucks for our morning coffee fix.
Bonus was they had their own village store too.
Thanks guys, we will definitely return - would totally recommend Ashmore Palms to anyone looking for a relaxed, fun-filled Gold Coast getaway
It's relaxed very friendly people who don't judge because you got loud children with ASD so much to do for the children you can just enjoy yourself

We needed a place to stay and I’ll thought because of the birds would pick this Ashmore Palms. Such a beautiful well-kept park, great roads with a welcoming entrance
The cabins are clean and tidy. The pool was a great place to rest but the added bonus was the beautiful Macaws collection. The  park was quiet each night and I had a great nights sleep

Great place for a family holiday. We had the double story rainforest retreat and it was so good being so close to the pool. Plenty to keep the kids occupied in the school holidays and close to all the action on the GC. Staff are friendly and grounds are nice and clean. We will return for sure.
The stay was fabulous, Rhonda and the team of entertainers were fantastic. Macaw Mansion was fab accommodation.

This is our second time staying at Ashmore Palms Holiday Village and we absolutely love it. It’s a perfect place for a quiet yet fun family holiday, while still being close to the beach and theme parks. Great customer service and the holiday activities are fantastic and keep the kids entertained — they already can’t wait to come back! The convenience store is very well stocked and open until 7pm, which is so handy, and the sports court and XPlay were also a big hit with the kids. We highly recommend it for families.

Came here with a sporting team.  Facilities are excellent.  Loved the pools and the huge BBQ facilities.  For a big park it was so quiet.  Great communication from staff and they were very friendly and helpful.
This is a fabulous venue and ideal for our needs. The property was very tidy, well organized and the staff were very friendly.

It was amazing staff were fantastic as a single father of four they made everything so much easier for me to enjoy my holiday too.
The daily activities were excellent and gave us enough time to do them and then drive to the theme parks.
At the end of the day it was incredible to relax in the pool.
Great place to stay at the Gold Coast with friendly staff and lovely well maintained grounds.

We stayed here earlier in the year and it was perfect. Ashmore palms is great value for money and not too far from nearby shops and theme parks. The little convenience store also came in handy! We will definitely be back! 😊🦜🌴

Stayed in the penthouse with 5 adults and 2kids in November.It has absolutely everything you need for an awesome family vacation. The holiday village is a close drive  to restaurants, shops and theme parks. Loved our stay it was so hard to leave !! Shout out to housekeeping - Lea and Diane they were amazing thankyou !!!
Thanks again Wellstead and Gibbs family 😊😊

We stayed here for a month and honestly had such a great time. Every staff member was super friendly and helpful. The room was clean, tidy and had everything we needed — literally just move in and start living. We also loved the little text updates whenever there were activities or anything happening on site.

One day our car wouldn’t start and a staff member came over straight away to help — really appreciated that.

There are so many good things about this place. We’ll definitely be back next time!

From No.32

Best accommodation!
Staff is so friendly and helpful.
Very clean cabins and amenities.
Park is beautiful, lots to see and do!

What can I say? Such a beautiful, relaxing place. The cabins are spotless, the gardens are lovely. The staff are amazing, so friendly with nothing being too much trouble.
The pool area is so clean, we had 2 young boys with us and they couldnt get enough of the pool. Playgrounds well maintained.
The macaws are so lovely and very well cared for.
We only stayed 6 nights but wish it was 60 🥰

Highly recommended amazing place good prices
Went above and beyond to help when my daughter had medical problems
Great friendly staff great location   Bird aviary give great touch

Beautiful place to stay! First thoughts on entry are that it feels homely! Comfortable stay, beds comfy, clean, very cosy! Great activities in the park, lots on offer! Would stay again! Only downfall for us was the car parks are quite tight with some of the cabins (not all)
This is a great holiday park. Lots of beautiful birds and friendly staff. Beautiful new cabins opened.

Brilliant!  The staff were so cheerful and nothing was too much trouble.
It’s the cleanest park I’ve ever stayed at, and the pool area was stunning.  I only wish we’d found this place sooner.  I’d definitely recommend Ashmore Palms holiday village, whether you have kids or not.

The best place in Ashmore hands down, 100/10 the pools are amazing , stuff are so nice, clean and quite they have a shop there that has free photos of u staying there run to this joint and book now will not regret absolutely the best place will be staying longer next time

The best place in Ashmore there is, this is the best place I’ve stayed at in years, this is something you can’t miss out on book now me and my family did 6 nights we would happily stay longer and will be next year. Most beautiful place ever ❤️

Awesome clean and tidy park, lots of activities for the kids, 2 really nice pools, the 2 bedroom cabin was probably the cleanest holiday park cabin that we've ever stayed in, updated rooms and amenities. Quiet location only a short drive to anywhere you need to be on the Gold Coast. Thanks for the stay

This was an amazing place to stay. Central clean and family friendly. The grounds need some work and it would have been nice to have a towel change over half way through our 7 day stay and to have 1 washing powder in the room as we were there for a longer stay but over all very good
We cancelled our booking as the property is charging $400 a night + $16 per child per night for bedding in January. Can not believe it’s so expensive.
They work hard creating a nice little community of friendly people.

My family and I have stayed here a total of 3 times and still amazed by the wonderful staff.
Located in a quiet area and only 20 minutes drive to the theme parks.
Central to all major shopping centres and all the fun activities that can be done on the Gold Coast.
Definitely recommend to everyone for a great place to stay on the Gold Coast.

We had a great stay in one of the cottages. Staff were super friendly and helpful. Very close to all attractions. Shops etc nearby either walking distance or short drive. Calm relaxing atmosphere  in the park. Pool was very much loved by all the kids and spent many times in there. Can highly recommend for families.
A wonderful place to stay when visiting the Gold Coast

Great amazing staff, really fun things for the kids, unfortunately wifi never worked. Some other teens (I assume teens) threw a smoothie at my car in the middle of the night which was unfortunate but no fault at all of the hotel. When ever I needed extra towels or sheet they provided them straight away . Staff need a raise 🙌

Unparalleled service, facilities and staff! This is an exceptional place to holiday! I can not recommend Ashmore Palms staff and facilities highly enough. Thank you, for an amazing stay! We will be back!

Super happy with the location.
Service and onsite facilities.
Birds were amazing aswel!
I think we picked the wrong cabin size for our family , but thats on us!
Perhaps the new luscious penthouse next time!
Love the place, see you next year.

Great place for a family break I would have given it a 5 but the rainforest retreat was too small especially in the room with the bunk beds was like a shoe box and very uncomfortable beds also it was a bit rundown & we couldn’t use the oven as it still had the stench of oven cleaner in it (this needs to be burnt off before anyone can use it….not ideal for younger kids in this area as there is a bit of a drop off out the back and no gate to keep them on the veranda so not very relaxing 🙁 however the staff were great and the village itself really nice great pool area & beautiful birds this is my second stay & would stay again just need better accommodation

We enjoyed our stay in a Macaw Mansion at Ashmore Palms Holiday Village it was in a central location to the theme parks and Surfers Paradise, beaches and shops. The kids enjoyed the pools and especially loved seeing the beautiful macaws. Facilities were very clean and staff friendly. We will definitely be back.

First time staying at Ashmore Palms Holiday Village and absolutely loved it! It’s a really nice family resort park, it was awesome being able to swim in the heated pool during winter and we played pickle ball everyday. The cabins were so clean and great cookware for a holiday place! All the staff were friendly when we checked in and out, whenever we went to the shop or to hire the activity equipment. 10/10 would recommend 😊 thank you again for our wonderful stay!
Great place to stay very close to the theme parks and gold coast and much more very good price for a family of 6

Thay are the friendly staff very efficient the cabins are kept clean the park is really nice it's easy to get to all the theme parks and what ever you want to do on the Gold Coast can not recommend this place more and I have been to a lot of parks in my time
An all round great accommodation

What an AMAZING place!! The grounds are so beautifully maintained and my unit was immaculately clean. Such a peaceful and relaxing environment.

As a bird lover it is so wonderful to see such a beautiful collection of birds that are so well cared for and obviously loved by all. All of the staff we encountered were welcoming, helpful, and genuinely passionate about what they do — especially when it comes to the birds.

It’s clear the staff take real pride in creating a unique and enjoyable experience, and their love for the resident birds adds a special touch. I’m already planning my next stay

It would be really cool if the birds had their names up on their aviaries. I was lucky enough to be around when there were staff there in the aviaries to ask. Corey, Nat and Helene were so lovely and happy to tell me about the birds which I really appreciated and made my stay that extra bit special

A really great location. Close to theme parks easy to get to from all areas. The cabins were great condition, everything was superb clean and the staff were lovely.
They had a number of avaries with a range of beautiful birds including macaws. As much as I don't like birds in cages these were lovely birds (some could say hello) they all looked happy enough.

This was my 1st place after coming to Australia with my family. Well organised place clean & tidy place. Specially Ms.Elaine is really kind and doing a great job. Thank you everyone who is working there and helping out with the stay for 8 months. Much love ❤️
飯店裏有小賣部，到晚上7點，自助洗衣機一次6塊澳幣（刷卡或2元/1元硬幣）一次30分鐘，烘乾機的時間一次6塊時程45分鐘。遊樂設施都是免費的，還有鸚鵡🦜可以看。
很適合親子同遊，因為每天都有不同的活動，而且活動都是免費的，有時候是動物有時候是手作，覺得很適合短期旅遊
Love this holiday cabin. Very clean and a great place to wander around.
Cabins are great

A great experience to have.
Liza, Rose and Jules are the best.
Staff were most helpful

Was a lovely place to stay staff very friendly very helpful. Our grandkids enjoyed the pool & the activities & our autistic grandson enjoyed the birds. We also found it close to the attractions that we visited. We would definitely stay here again

Ashmore Palms Holiday Village is an absolutely fantastic destination for families and anyone looking for a relaxing getaway. The park is beautifully maintained, with immaculate, clean cabins that make you feel right at home. The surrounding environment is peaceful and filled with lush greenery, creating the perfect setting for a refreshing stay.

The pools are a highlight, providing hours of fun for kids and a great way for adults to unwind. The resident birds add a unique charm to the park, giving it a tropical and lively atmosphere.

One of the standout features is the variety of organized children’s activities. There’s something fun happening nearly every day, keeping kids entertained and making it a truly family-friendly place.

Overall, Ashmore Palms Holiday Village combines cleanliness, natural beauty, and thoughtful activities to create an unforgettable experience. Highly recommended for families and nature lovers!

We stayed in Ashmore palms last week and had the best time. The service was great, everyone was so helpful. The rooms and facilities were so clean, couldn’t ask for more. All the basic necessities needed when staying somewhere are supplied in the room, like cutlery, toaster ,microwave , washing basket and like, iron etc…. We absolutely loved seeing the macaws and learning about them when their cages were getting cleaned every morning. But the highlight of the trip for my 4 year old was the activities with Miss Kelly. The activities were free and the timing is perfect so you can still go to the theme parks etc after attending activities. Would definitely stay here again
Best place to stay if you go in holiday. Kids friendly they have alot of activities for kids in the morning. Highly recommend 👍

We had the most wonderful time at Ashmore Palms. We stayed for 10 days and wish it was longer! The perfect place to stay with a young family, out of the hustle and bustle of Surfers but still so close to everything you need. The staff were brilliant, so kind to our kids and always friendly. Our room was lovely, clean and comfortable. The pool and playground are both excellent and completely kid friendly! Miss Kelly’s activities (which were complimentary) were such a highlight and were happening most days. I used to stay here as a child with my family and I am so happy we decided to continue this with our own children now. The biggest highlight for me and just showed the amount of care that Ashmore Palms have is that I mentioned when checking out that I’d lost my earring during our stay (likely the pool) and thought it was surely long gone. Lo and behold a week after returning home, in the letterbox, my earring posted home. That is caring service. Can’t wait to go back! ☀️

We absolutely loved our stay at Ashmore Palms! The kids had a ball in the pools and parks. I can’t believe how many gorgeous birds there are, it was lovely walking around all their aviaries taking photos. The staff are so friendly and the park is well looked after, very clean and tidy! Thanks Ashmore Palms for a wonderful time we will definitely recommend to family and friends and will come back in the near future :-)

we stayed for 7 day and extended by 1 day.
it is by FAR the cleanest and best maintained accommodation myself and family have been lucky enough to stay in.
The feeling of pride from the owners down to the everyday hard working employees, showed every day of our stay.
the accommodation was the best maintained accommodation ive stayed in.

To see small wear and tear marks such as chips on the corner of a walls had been touched up with paint and made clean and neat, is just one of the small details that show the true difference when staying somewhere.

We most certainly will be staying again and will recommend to everyone i know headed to the Gold coast for a holiday
great prices, great pool area and a lovely quite park (except the birds which are loud but wonderful)
Was good place just air cons in rooms not verry good

Ashmore Palm is great for a family holiday We enjoyed our stay.

It is very clean and has friendly staff
It's a great place for families a lot of kids activities and very clean when i arrived I meant very clean

Ashmore Palms is the best spot to spend your holiday. We stayed for 2 weeks and give everything about this resort a 10/10. Rose in reception is the sweetest lady you will ever come across. She made my sons holiday. He was so excited to see her and always asked "Where's Rose"
The park is super clean and so are the rooms. The cleaning crew were exceptional and were always willing to go out of there way.
The birds are absolutely beautiful and make this park such a personal experience. We loved all aspects of Ashmore Palms and I highly recommend everyone to experience it.
We will be back!

Beds need updating small cabins, hard beds, and bigger cabins to soft.
I'd recommend a pillow top mattress mattress covering that doesn't do justice
The majority of tourists are travelling through town and need rest
Love the location. Facilities are nice and clean. Sufficient security and decent people in the cottages. Definitely recommend and will definitely come back here for future holidays.
Great family place big cabins heated and normal pools bird avery and heaps of kids activities

I love this place, the Macaws, pools, laundries, easy access to everything on the GC

Staff are amazing.

I wish more places were this good!!
Strange bird prison

Have been hear so many times, BUT this round was disappointing. 1 Wife i had to top up and for the price you pay for 2 bedroom cabin should off been unlimited and the electric frying pan leg's were broken, I had to fix. Had to leave 1 day early and they won't refund 1 day. I will NOT be going back there again.

Ashmore Palms is a great spot to holiday, convenient location, beautiful facility with the pool and share areas. The staff are amazing as well, even fixing our noisy fans without us reporting it. The staff were so friendly and made it a great 12 day stay. Can’t wait to go back.

We recently stayed 2 weeks ago with our family of 5 in the lorikeet rooms. They were clean, tidy and had all that we needed. The staff were very helpful and accommodating. The kids loved the pool but choose to only swim in one with mushrooms as other was too cold. They loved the school holiday activities that were on each day and the fact they were verbally on before we left to do anything each day. Great location with supermarket and pharmacy just done the road. Will definitely stay again on our next overseas holiday to the gc

We have just left after a 10 day stay at Ashmore. What a perfect family holiday stay we had. We loved all the birds, staff were so friendly and helpful, everything was super clean, rooms had everything we needed, kids loved the pool and tennis courts, and it was pretty quiet in general. Only things we could fault is that the frying pan wasn't big enough for our family of 5, and the kids wish the birds names were on the cages (and bonus points for info and ages of the birds). Loved seeing the lizards around the place too.
It's such a perfect location if you have a car. Theme parks and the beach is only a 15 minute drive away. Supermarkets are super handy. Close to Ashmore Outlets shops for great, easy shopping. Totally recommend this accommodation!

We recently returned from our holiday, but unfortunately, our experience was not the best. When we arrived, the pool area was crowded with teenagers from a school group, so we couldn’t use it that day. The next evening, we tried going around 6 pm, but since the pools aren't heated, the water was too cold for a swim.

While this place is great for families with younger kids (under 10), it doesn’t offer much for teenagers, as most of the activities are geared towards younger children. Another downside was the limited and slow Wi-Fi. We were only given 14 GB to use over seven days, which wasn’t nearly enough for the five of us.

One particularly frustrating issue was getting coins to use the laundry facilities. I had to go all the way to an ANZ bank because the reception couldn’t assist with this. In New Zealand, most holiday parks help guests exchange coins or simply charge it to their account. When I suggested charging $10 to my credit card, the response was, “We’re not a bank!” Overall, I was very disappointed with the experience.

I recently stayed at this hotel and had a fantastic experience! The room was spotlessly clean, which made for a very comfortable stay. The location was perfect, making it easy to explore the area. The staff were incredibly friendly and always ready to help. Plus, there were so many activities for kids to enjoy, keeping them entertained throughout our visit. I highly recommend this hotel for families looking for a great getaway!

We had a great stay at Ashmore Palms Holiday Village. It's a great place to stay with young kids  and we took full use of the pool, playgrounds and birds. The kids activities were an added bonus! It was close enough to the beach and activities like sea world. Also a bonus was it is in walking distance to supermarket, cafes and restaurants so accessing food was easy.

Most of the reception staff were lovely, Miss Kellie was definitely a favourite with my children and her activities were fantastic.
The clown on the weekend was also cool too!
The room was well set out, very clean and had everything we needed.
Our photo booth photos were also really cool!

Friendly staff!
Beautiful serenity!
My kids loved the two pools!
Very well maintained!
They have a general store which is afforded for bits and pieces.
Very highly recommended and we will definitely be coming back again!
Fantastic

I love Ashmore Palms! I visited as a kid over 20 years ago and had great memories. I took my family of 6 there last week, and it did not disappoint.
The gardens are magnificent, a little slice of paradise, with a private balcony with a beautiful view in our rainforest retreat. Our kids loved talking to all the beautiful birds, playing in the playrounds and pools too. We had an issue with some rowdy neighbours one night, but it was dealt with well. Every other night was so peaceful as the park is away from the busy streets.
We look forward to coming back one day.
Well maintained with beautiful surroundings.  Great place to stay

We had a fantastic stay. Great pool for the kids. The birds were awesome for the kids to see.
We will be back.

Absolutely beautiful. The grounds are beautiful and tranquil. The birds and the families running around adds to the atmosphere. The pools were a big hit with my children as were the birds. The activities with Miss Kelly were also a big hit. The unit we stayed in were beautiful and practical.

All staff were friendly and welcoming.
Really enjoyed staying here with my family. The villa was well equipped, super clean and modern. Could not fault it at all. Don’t forget to get a free photo. The staff were excellent.

Ashmore Palms exceeded all of our expectations! Gorgeous lagoon pools , playgrounds and room to move . By far the best part though is the activities- so far the kids have had face painting , a disco and games night,  an Easter egg hunt and a magic show ! It’s a wonderful family friendly place and we will be returning and making it a holiday tradition

We spent last weekend here. I wish I could give this place more than 5 stars. The rooms were so clean and spacious, we stayed in the Mccaw mansion, and it was more than big enough for my family of 5. The kids loved the bunk beds, everything you need in the kitchen to cook your own meals and save money on takeaway. The pools were amazing, perfect for my young ones. The birds were absolutely loved by my kids, they walked through at least 3 times a day and never got sick of it. We played tennis, and played in their parks, we had a great time.  The staff were so great, great customer service, and so friendly. On the last night I was abit embarrassed because my 3 year old son wet the bed during his sleep, I told the staff and they made me feel so at ease, told me not to stress that it would all be taken care of, and I love that they were like “kids will be kids”. I loved this place and would go back every chance I had.
Great venue with plenty for families to see and do. Handy to freeway and attractions

We absolutely loved our stay here with our two children (1y and 3yr). The service was impeccable, everyone was so friendly. The cabin was the perfect size for our family of 4.
Our light sleeping 1 year old slept in the front room. We bought our own cot and this fit perfectly next to the bunk bed there. Our 3 year old slept in the room across from us on the lower bunk bed and he loved this space. Each room had a fan and convenient power points. The kitchen had everything we needed but we did bring our own oil to cook with.
The kids loved the pool and the birds nest to it. We didn't have time to enjoy the free activities they had there for the kids but we did use the complimentary VR ball game(it was bliss with the air conditioning!)
We found it a great location as it is quiet and only a little drive (10mins) North to MovieWorld and Wet'n'Wild but then SeaWorld is closer and then surfers is south east 10mins.

As a family of four it's hard to get a place that is not overly expensive but good for the money you spend...we spent 3 nights and we all loved it..pools are amazing and all the birds wow..little miss 2 loved them and been a couple said hello..cabin were clean and very up to date...Will becoming back again and again
Loved staying here

Ashmore Palms Village 🌴 is nestled away in a beautiful tranquil location, and it's close to all the major attractions.  Our accommodation sleeps 6, it included a washer and dryer, kitchen, master bedroom with an ensuite and TV, and a BBQ. This property is beautiful and fantastic when you're holidaying with kids. There's also the beautiful bird sanctuary around the pools and school holiday activities for the kids. I would highly recommend this property and will stay here again when I'm holidaying  at the Gold Coast.
Great place to stay awesome staff. Good value for money and perfectly placed on the gold coast

Lovely staff fantastic place for the kids. Horrible beds. However lounge was ok.
Very clean place
Fantastic place for kids
Always gr8 for the family to get back here

We booked 5 nights and stayed only one night and then left for a 12 hour drive home.
Room was spotless upon arrival but seemed to have strange microscopic creatures, my wife suffered over 10 big bytes on her legs that were extremely itchy and painful, and I barely slept as things were crawling on me all night.
My daughter suffered few bytes in another room and there were ants crawling in one of the upper beds in one of the room.
Receptionist said that’s quite normal there and she said it was the sand flies which cannot be seen with an eye.
There is 1 aircon unit in a small living room and other rooms have fans.
Internet is very poor with 1-2gb limit per day and even with that allowance its bad. There is no connection to TV ie:(Netflix)
You have to bring your own devices and internet.
Location is ok, a bit inland with about 20-30 min drive to main beach and Gold Coast.
The 2 pools are nice.
Good pool cabin and services and prices

Please, in future do not close the phone in any customers face, and no, do not blame it on a bad line as I could hear you perfectly and I’m pretty sure you could hear me as well , always be respectful, I gave you a chance to apologise as I do not like writing bad reviews. However I can change this review all you need to do is apologise Laura.
Everything was exceptional
Nice place family atmosphere

Close to shops, 20 min drive to the beach, comfortable little cabin with good little kitchen and bathroom. Comfortable for a small family but could be too squishy for a larger family.
Love the macaws and other birds in the aviaries. Would happily stay here again.
The colours are amazing!

This is one of the best kept secrets on the Gold coast 🥰
A beautiful, friendly, family holiday destination.

Beautiful pools in varying depths. Heaps of wild life. Bucket loads of photo opportunities and things to do, like bush walking around the perimeter.
Only a short walk to a bakery and grocery store.

I know so many people who have stayed at this resort and then within a year moved to the Gold Coast.
Ashmore Palms really needs to be renamed the gateway to the Gold coast. 🍹🥰🍍
You've been warned, if you stay here once, you'll probably move here forever.

There is individual parking if you have a rental car, and there is plenty of guest parking or front.

It's about a 5-minute Uber to the tram line, which will take you to Surfers Paradise, it slso connects with the trains and can take you to all the way to Brisbane City.

Bring your swimmers, throw a snag on the Barbie, and enjoy your stay at a great holiday location. Better, and cheaper, than the near by "5-star" resorts 😍

My Grandson and I were recent guests of Ashmore Palms Holiday Village, we were both super impressed with the location,  standard of accommodation, friendly service and atmosphere. The facilities, entertainment, games were all first rate and the exotic birds were the icing on the cake. Well done Team Ashmore Palms.
Good for rest one week 😊
Cabins very clean with everything you need. Great pool, and BBQ areas. Kids enjoyed the playground and the beautiful birds.
Close to facilities, clean and relaxing

Although most of the service was good and most people were very friendly and helpful, one of the men that work there went out of there way to make it a less enjoyable experience and were quite rude. I seen the same man spraying a hose at a bird nest and then later on smashing the nest apart with a pole. I understand that Ibis birds can be pests but the treatment I witnessed went beyond cruel, for a place that claims to love birds it was highly concerning. We also we were not told that smoking was banned from the entire caravan park, there are ash trays outside the cabins so that's very misleading. We came home to a very rude letter complaining about it and the same man even came and took the ash tray away. Also seen him yell at a little boy for riding his scooter and had him speak quite rudely to us a number of times. All in all it was a lovely place with beautiful rooms and lovely staff, it was just that one man who tried very hard to ruin the experience and should not be allowed near any animals.
Doesn't provide long term for mother and 3 kids dont bother wasting your time people
The bird life is unbelievable.  Friendly family orientated accommodation.

Nice central location between Surfers Paradise and Theme Parks (movie world, wet and wild) that we visited. Secure location, very family friendly. The resort organised kid friendly activities for the 7 days we were there. The pool and surrounding area were always clean and upkeep was carried out daily around the resort. Friendly staff and they have a very convenient shop for basic necessities at the main office.
Very well maintained property, ideal for families.
Absolutely loved staying here, it was so clean and tidy the staff very friendly and helpful, the grandchildren cant stop talking about the pool and playgrounds. We will be back next year we hope.
This was my 6 time at this lovely  place and I be back

Came here over 35 years ago
It has grown so much and is beautiful very impressed
Perfect for family groups from youngsters to pre-teens. We loved Miss Kellie and her morning activities.
Just awesome.
